category_sources: Official Tarsnap scrypt page presents scrypt as a password-based encryption/key-derivation tool.
source_facts.description says it encrypts and decrypts files using a memory-hard password function.
display_name_sources: Official Tarsnap project page uses the name scrypt.
source_facts.name identifies the project as scrypt.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official Tarsnap scrypt project and documentation page.
repo_sources: Official Tarsnap GitHub repository is the source-control repository for scrypt.
tags_sources: Official scrypt project materials describe the scrypt key derivation function.
source_facts.description describes file encryption/decryption using a memory-hard password function.
